judgment.summary: Exceptional growth and high-margin profitability are paired with a very high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 0.33 beat the 0.28 estimate, with the next earnings date on 2026-08-03.
negatives: Price/Book 42.10 — high premium over book value.

news.paragraph: Palantir is facing recent downward pressure, with reports highlighting that the stock is down 26% in 2026 and sinking today. However, options traders should note unusual call buying activity that suggests some market participants see value at these levels. The market is also still processing analyst feedback from the recent Q1 earnings call regarding the company's rapid growth.
headlines: $1000 Invested In Palantir Technologies 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Palantir Shows Huge Unusual Call Options Buying  - PLTR Could Be Cheap Here
